name: patent-skills
description: Patent and IP skills for inventors, entrepreneurs, and startups. Covers Vietnamese IP Law, PCT, and USPTO. Prior art search, patent drafting, claims analysis, office action responses, IP strategy, and licensing — all in one plugin.

plugins.name: patent-skills
plugins.description: 7 patent and IP skills for inventors and entrepreneurs: prior art research, provisional claims, full application drafting, patent strategy, claims analysis, office action responses, and IP valuation/licensing. Built on Vietnamese IP Law (Luật SHTT 2022), PCT, and USPTO standards.
